title: wedelia rugosa var. nitens
intro: Wedelia rugosa var. nitens, also known as the shining Wedelia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family and is native to East Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia rugosa var. nitens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and promote wound healing, among others. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
